response: The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), founded in 1861, ranks as the top university globally with an enrollment of 11,500 students and a highly selective acceptance rate of just 3.9%. It boasts an impressive endowment of $24.6 billion, annual tuition of $57,590, and a faculty of 1,069 members, including 98 Nobel laureates who contribute to its world-renowned research and innovation.
